# Copilot instructions for nextjs-app

<!-- Generated by RepoCanon. Safe to edit by hand; regenerate with `repocanon generate copilot .` to refresh inferred sections. -->

## Project context

`nextjs-app` is a single package repository written primarily in TypeScript. Detected frameworks/tools: Next.js, React, Vitest, Playwright, ESLint.

## Frameworks and tools

- Next.js — web
- React — frontend
- Vitest — test
- Playwright — test
- ESLint — lint
- Prettier — format
- TypeScript — language-tooling
- Tailwind CSS — ui
- Zod — validation

## Commands Copilot should suggest

- **Install**: `npm install`
- **Dev**: `npm run dev`
- **Build**: `npm run build`
- **Test**: `npm run test`
- **Lint**: `npm run lint`
- **Format**: `npm run format`
- **Typecheck**: `npm run typecheck`

## Conventions to follow

- **JS/TS language**: TypeScript-first
- **TypeScript file naming**: camelCase modules
- **Next.js routing**: App Router under app/

## When unsure

Prefer asking a clarifying question over inventing repo-specific behavior. Mirror existing patterns from neighboring files instead of introducing new ones.
